translations.01KQXQV12JS3RHN63BKY6E58HA: 尽管文件浏览和代码审查等高级功能当前已禁用，但您的其余 Warp 化体验仍完全可用。

notes: docker_sandbox/mod.rs:220 — `return Err("Timed out...")` string propagates up and is consumed only by log::error! (mod.rs:278); never rendered to UI -> telemetry_payload. ssh_remote_server_failed_banner.rs:21 — BANNER_BODY user-facing banner text rendered via Text element -> translate; 'Warpified' rendered as Warp化 (brand Warp preserved). theme_deletion_modal.rs:13 — modal header (dialog title), interrogative -> '？'. workflow.rs:375 — serde::de::Error::custom deserialization error, developer-facing -> telemetry_payload. wasm_view.rs:65 — ActionButton label UI -> translate. computer_use/windows/mod.rs:90 — NO_INPUT_DESKTOP_ERROR const returned as Error to callers (diagnostic), not UI -> telemetry_payload. paragraph.rs:17 — editor empty-block placeholder text, UI -> translate; Markdown brand preserved. intro_slide.rs:89 — link label 'Log in' UI -> translate (登录). state.rs:287 — .expect("Server root URL should be valid") -> panic_message. mac/app.rs:90 — RUST_WRAPPER_IVAR_NAME ObjC ivar identifier string, runtime key not UI -> protocol_key. accessibility.rs:111 & text.rs:196/205 — .expect(...) assertion strings -> panic_message.
